article.class: bg-card rounded-theme p-5 md:p-[30px] shadow-card border border-border mb-[30px]

h1.class: text-2xl md:text-[28px] font-extrabold mb-[15px] leading-tight text-text

div.class: flex flex-col gap-2.5 border-b border-border pb-[15px] mb-5 text-xs md:text-[13px] text-muted

a.class: bg-surface border border-border text-muted text-[10px] font-semibold px-2 py-0.5 rounded hover:text-primary hover:border-transparent hover:bg-primary/10 transition-fast font-sans

div.class: bg-bg border border-dashed border-border rounded-theme p-5 flex items-center justify-center text-muted text-xs md:text-sm font-semibold my-5 hover:border-primary hover:bg-primary/[0.02] transition-fast
flex justify-between items-center flex-wrap gap-[15px] mb-[25px]

button.class: bg-border border border-border rounded-theme text-text py-2 px-4 text-xs font-semibold cursor-pointer flex items-center gap-2 hover:border-transparent hover:bg-primary/10 hover:text-primary transition-fast bookmark-toggle-btn

a.class: w-9 h-9 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-white transition-fast bg-[#1877f2] hover:bg-[#135cb7]
a.title: Share on Facebook

a.class: w-9 h-9 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-white transition-fast bg-[#25d366] hover:bg-[#1eaf53]
a.title: Share on WhatsApp

a.class: w-9 h-9 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-white transition-fast bg-[#0088cc] hover:bg-[#006699]
a.title: Share on Telegram

div.class: bg-bg border border-dashed border-border rounded-theme p-5 flex items-center justify-center text-muted text-xs md:text-sm font-semibold my-5 hover:border-primary hover:bg-primary/[0.02] transition-fast
flex justify-between gap-[15px] border-t border-border mt-[30px] pt-5

a.class: bg-border text-text py-2.5 px-3.5 md:px-5 rounded-theme font-semibold text-xs md:text-sm flex items-center gap-1.5 border border-transparent hover:bg-primary hover:text-bg hover:border-primary transition-fast

bg-border text-text py-2.5 px-3.5 md:px-5 rounded-theme font-semibold text-xs md:text-sm flex items-center gap-1.5 border border-transparent hover:bg-primary hover:text-bg hover:border-primary transition-fast

bg-border text-text py-2.5 px-3.5 md:px-5 rounded-theme font-semibold text-xs md:text-sm flex items-center gap-1.5 border border-transparent hover:bg-primary hover:text-bg hover:border-primary transition-fast
